title: Level 610.1
wikitext:

{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 610.1: "Wishful Demandings"}}__NOTOC____NOEDITSECTION__

''' Ж '''


[[File:610-1.jpeg|center|link=]]

'''Level 610.1''' is the first ever discovered sublevel of [[Level 610]], which, due to unknown reasons, is only reachable from [[Level 610]] under certain conditions, usually consisting of [[Phenomenon_29|[]]] through [[Level 610]].

{{Background|file=dark6.png}}
LEVEL '''610.1'''
THREAT INDEX
Class Sheol

'''Exit:''' 5/5
Prevented Relief
'''Environment:''' ?/5
Suitable Under Conditions
'''Entities:''' ?/5
Not so different...

'''Level 610.1''' consists of bars built upon each other endlessly continuing incomprehensible amounts. Bare architecture seems to be a warehouse over-decorated with bar architecture, suggesting both [[Level 610]] and '''Level 610.1''' might exist as a characterized warehouse complex seen within [[Level Fun]] and much more. Thus, this engages with the interior Levels’ common attributes throughout [[Level List|The Backrooms]]. '''Level 610.1''' falls under an urbex state, as the entire level is in corrosive, abandoned, and beyond-repair conditions. Even though it acts as surplus corrosion, the current state seems to be unchanging; contrarily, the general entropy of the level obstructs any change, such that it breaches thermodynamic laws, though it cannot be explained within regular scientific borders. '''Level 610.1'''’s general conditions can be counted as a harsh environment, including environmental hazards such as a lack of air circulation, a lack of proper, safe nutrition sources, and major structural deterioration, resulting in the complex tragically collapsing on itself. Although consisting of such an environment, '''Level 610.1''' is usually described as “suitable under conditions” by some, which is considered as the complex might consist of some habitat, those recommendations usually come from theorised sightings, such as humanoid entities roaming the Level without interacting with wanderers, who seemed to be actively securing the old ‘Social’ scheme of the bars by surviving on leftovers, while acting as the complex remains alive. Such discourse of '''Level 610.1''' is still left unredeemed, induced from an unescapable nature of the Level; any further research or investigation by personnel is highly discouraged. Thus, it’s highly recommended that one avoid any attempt to enter the level.

{{Collapse|num=1|initial=
'''[...]'''|final=|body=
You never even looked back. There is no meaning in regret anymore. Human life swings between extremes. At times, you are the sovereign atop the hill, as though the entire universe orbits you alone. You flaunt your triumphs as if gods kneel before you, and the clearest proof of autonomy stands within the person reflected in the mirror. Then, you may descend into the pit. Some slip; some plunge by choice into its depths. The pit resembles a singularity. It feels like the event horizon of a black hole; once you fall, you begin to believe you will never ascend. You convince yourself you are the most wretched, miserable being alive. Perhaps the universe truly opposes you. Perhaps the gods truly choose to punish you. What even is will, if you cannot afford the luxury of thought? What even is living if you are incapable of taking pleasure in life? All of these are luxuries, whether we realize it or not. They remind us that we are still on the road somewhere. The universe is uncertain, and the gods are our limits. By nature, we embrace them. So then, what now? I saw the hesitation in you. The silence must have struck hard. You may drown yourself in regret. Along this path, which of us has not abandoned someone face-down in the dirt at least once? Which of us has not separated the importance of our own lives from the lives of others? We defend will without thinking much about it. We choose to live without ever understanding what living truly means. Who knows how many more miserable souls will choose these same paths, and how many already have? Perhaps awareness itself defends will. Perhaps it proves that you are capable of thought. Or perhaps struggling within this sea of thoughts, drifting through emotion after emotion, is what proves you were alive at all. This place, however, is not worth experiencing any of it for. You already left your entire past behind long ago. Now, you are nothing more than an unobservable singularity within the universe. If gods are limits, then you are merely a fragment of that limit itself. Whether you boast that you are divine or rage because you are separate from it, you have become one with the pit. As your body convulsed for the final time, you became more alive than you had ever been before. Yet even that will fade. The road ahead of your future is sealed shut. Every path leads back to the singularity. With tear-filled eyes, you looked upon your skin one final time. You are no different from a ghost now, a faded memory. You are nothing more than the nostalgia of this building. You became one with the pit, and now exist only as a fragment of reality itself. Life and emotion no longer hold meaning for you. The immortal god you once felt upon the peaks, you have now found within the immortal memory buried in the pit. Close your eyes, and fade into other memories.
}}
